messages.text: i saw those straps and bar and immediately felt poor
both, that bar looks cheaper than your ankle situation
bold talk from someone not even stretching
im stretching my budget to survive your wrist stack actually
ok finance bro, touch some reformer handles then
im stubborn, id suffer in silence just to impress
you would be wheezing so loud the straps vibrate
so you booking a pilates date now
yeah, you bring the wooden bar, i bring snacks and suffering
snacks might save you, wooden bar will not
friday night. i'll pick you up
